# Fixtures

Test specs used by oadig integration tests.

## Files

- `petstore.yaml` / `petstore.json`: Minimal OpenAPI 3.1 petstore. Hand-written, inspired by the official OpenAPI petstore example. Titled "Petstore" for test stability.
- `circular.yaml`: Minimal spec exercising circular `$ref` (Node → children → Node).

## Licensing

All fixtures in this directory are hand-written for testing and released under the same license as oadig.
